g.text: The phishing mail has been sent to the target with the following tools.
In this intrusion, an instance of the BumbleBee process
C:\Program Files\Windows Photo Viewer\ImagingDevices.exe was created and accessed by .
rundll32.exe Shortly after this interaction, the process began communicating with a Meterpreter C2
The Meterpreter server was used to host the Cobalt Strike C2 server.
The first discovery stage includes TTPs that we have seen in multiple
cases, such as trusts discovery, domain admin group discovery, network discovery and process enumeration.
A remote service was created on one of the workstations in order to dump lsass.
Procdump executed via remote service creaton
AnyDesk was installed to facilitate interactive desktop command and control access to a server in the environment.
A new local administrator user was created on a server to facilitate persistence on the machine.
AdFind.exe was renamed to af.exe and was used by threat actors in order to enumerate AD users, computers, OU, trusts,
The threat actor accessed multiple documents and folders from a remote file server.
The SMB share was accessed through a compromised server via an AnyDesk session.
iexplorer.exe used to check for OWA on Exchange Server
